output_debit_classifier.reason: This is a debt-to-equity conversion transaction. The corporation is extinguishing a $200 bank loan liability by issuing 400 common shares to the lender. Under IFRS, such conversions are recorded at the carrying amount of the financial liability being extinguished (IFRS 9). The loan payable account is debited to remove the liability, and Issued capital is credited to record the equity issued. The transaction involves no cash, no gain or loss, and no tax implications (equity issuances are not taxable events). The entry balances at $200 debit = $200 credit.
